pageContext.name: Mr. Pink UberGuggi
pageContext.description: Mr. Pink UberGuggi is here and he's ready to chop tf out of your collection!  A love child between Jack the Ripper and the pink stripe in the rainbow, Mr. Pink was born on the catwalks of NYC and raised in the nicest Malibu mansion your daddy's money can buy. Equipped with an iconic Guggi mask and a never-dulling axe, this 17  UberGuggi is runway-ready.  Only 999 made so be sure to place your order today!
